Protective pause

Scamurai

Check a suspicious message before you reply, pay, click, or share information.

● Manual protection is ready

Check a message

Paste only the suspicious words you need checked. Remove account numbers, passwords, security codes, and private identifiers.

Protection status

Background monitoring
Not enabled
Automatic sending
Off
Storage
This device only

Scamurai does not silently read other apps, calls, messages, or browser pages. An approved Arcane capability or browser extension is required for that protection.

Trusted contacts

Add up to three email addresses, one per line. Scamurai prepares an email; you review and send it.

Recent checks

Three safe moves

  1. Stop the conversation.
  2. Verify using a number or website you already trust.
  3. Ask a trusted person before sending money or information.
